title: Create: Smorestuff
description: A Create add-on based on S'mores!
body:
![Create: Smorestuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5a8059e2d23c594c6af6e5f9cb3b4bfceadf977.png)

A small Create mod add-on based around s'mores. Credit to [Kaupenjoe's Modding Tutorials](https://youtube.com/@ModdingByKaupenjoe) on YouTube and, of course, the [Creators of Create](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create) team for making mods like this possible in the first place!

This addon (while currently very small but I plan to expand) makes an effort to add everyone's favorite campfire snack, the s'more, to Minecraft through the use of the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create). (Eventually) There will be s'mores that have different effects that can be beneficial to you or used to prank a friend, and I am also planning to add s'more-related armor and tools that give unique advantages to the players using them.

While I am very enthusiastic about this project, please remember that I am a two-person dev team (my friend does the art, I can't draw :[) and features will be very slow to develop. If you would like to contribute ideas or code, please visit my Discord server or submit a pull request on GitHub.

Reminder: This mod, like Create, must be present on the client and the server (or just the client in singleplayer) to function properly.
